display.purpose: Marketing headlines and large dashboard figures (44px).

body.purpose: Product workhorse text, table cells, form values (14px).

label.purpose: Field labels, chips, table column heads (12px).

shadows.name: theme-xs
shadows.purpose: Resting hint for inputs and small controls.

motion.name: float
motion.purpose: Legacy marketing decorative float — do not use in product.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single primary action on a product screen. Solid indigo, 8px corners.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; background: #6366f1; color: #fff; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; border: none; transition: background-color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #4f46e5; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(70,95,255,0.12); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Non-primary action. Neutral gray so the primary verb stays unambiguous.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; background: #e5e7eb; color: #111827; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; border: none; transition: background-color 0.15s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #d1d5db; }

components.name: Gradient Button (legacy marketing)
components.description: Legacy violet pill CTA. Marketing (site)/ only — forbidden on product screens.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-gradient">เริ่มต้นใช้งาน</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-gradient { padding: 12px 28px; border-radius: 9999px; background-image: linear-gradient(97deg, #725cff 0%, #b5b1ff 140.21%); color: #fff; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; border: none; background-size: 200% auto; background-position: 0% center; transition: background-position 0.6s ease-in-out, transform 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-gradient:hover { background-image: linear-gradient(97deg, #b5b1ff 0%, #725cff 140.21%); background-position: 100% center; }

components.name: POS Input
components.description: The product input. 8px corners, indigo focus ring. Use everywhere in POS/admin/booking.
components.html: <input class="ds-input-pos" placeholder="ค้นหาสินค้า" />
components.css: .ds-input-pos { width: 100%; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; background: #fff; color: #111827; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.25rem; } .ds-input-pos:focus { outline: none; border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(99,102,241,0.2); }

components.name: Pill Input (legacy marketing)
components.description: Legacy fully-rounded input. (site)/ and auth pages only.
components.css: .ds-input-pill { height: 48px; width: 100%; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; background: #fff; color: #1f2937; font-size: 0.875rem; box-shadow: 0px 1px 2px 0px rgba(16,24,40,0.05); } .ds-input-pill::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; } .ds-input-pill:focus { outline: none; border-color: #bdb4fe; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(189,180,254,0.2); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Product container. Flat at rest, 1px border defines the edge.
components.html:
สนาม A

ว่าง 18:00–19:00
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #d1d5db; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #1f2937; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-card-body { font-size: 14px; color: #4b5563; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: 88ARENA is a well-run counter at a busy sports venue: the surface is clear, every tool is within reach, and nothing sits on the counter that doesn't earn its place. Customers grab a slot and pay; cashiers ring up sales between rallies; admins set the rules. The interface serves all three by getting out of the way. This is a product system, not a marketing surface. Function comes first: solid fills, predictable rectangles with gently softened corners, high-contrast text on calm neutrals. Color directs, not decorates. Depth comes from contrast and tonal layering, not piled-on shadows. The system rejects the generic AI-starter / SaaS-template look it inherited; violet hero glows and floating blobs belong to the legacy marketing pages under (site)/, not the product.
keyCharacteristics: Function-first: the primary action is always the most prominent thing on screen.
Calm neutrals, one decisive action color.
Softly rounded rectangles (8px), not pills, in the product surface.
Flat by default; elevation is a response to state, never ambient noise.
First-class dark mode at AA contrast, not an afterthought.

rules.name: The One Action Color Rule
rules.body: On any product screen, the indigo action color marks exactly one primary verb. Secondary actions are neutral gray. If two buttons both shout indigo, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Gradient Quarantine Rule
rules.body: The violet→lilac gradient and pink accent are quarantined to (site)/ marketing. They are forbidden on POS, admin tables, and booking flows. A gradient on a cashier screen is a bug.

rules.name: The 14px Workhorse Rule
rules.body: Product body text is 14px. Booking and POS screens are data-dense; oversized body copy wastes the counter. Reserve larger sizes for true headlines and dashboard figures.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A surface at rest carries no shadow. Shadows mean 'this is floating above the page right now' — hover, overlay, focus. Nothing else.

dos: Do make the single primary action the most prominent element using Action Indigo (#6366f1). One per screen.
Do keep product surfaces flat at rest; add shadow only on hover, focus, or for true overlays.
Do use 8px (rounded-lg) corners and the 14px body size on POS, admin, and booking screens.
Do ship every screen with light AND dark variants at AA contrast — dark mode is first-class.
Do use neutral gray for secondary buttons so the primary verb stays unambiguous.
donts: Don't reproduce the generic AI-starter / SaaS-template look: no violet hero glows, no floating animated blobs, no decorative gradient flourishes on product screens.
Don't put the brand violet→lilac gradient or accent pink (#ff57d5) on POS, admin tables, or booking flows. It belongs to (site)/ only.
Don't use fully-rounded pills for product buttons or inputs; pills read as marketing. Product uses 8px corners.
Don't carry resting drop shadows on cards. A shadow with no state behind it is noise.
Don't oversize body copy on data-dense screens; 14px is the workhorse.
Don't light up two indigo primary buttons in the same view.
